title: Spicy Silky Fajitas
description: Savory fajitas filled with spicy peppers and silky stir-fried onions, served with a side of warm flour tortillas.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced peppers and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and crushed red pepper flakes.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Warm flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing the cooked vegetables onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
Serve with your favorite toppings, such as sour cream, shredded cheese, and diced tomatoes.
